summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard conservatively using the hydrated preflight artifact. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. No close, merge, fix, or PR-raise actions are planned; each open PR remains open for ordinary maintainer or author follow-up, and the two hydrated linked open issues are kept as related context.

actions.reason: Useful independent contributor PR; not low-signal, not a duplicate, and merge/fix actions are blocked by the job.
Focused contributor PR with useful code; keep open for maintainer review rather than close or merge in this close/comment/label-only inventory job.
Useful focused bug-fix PR; keep open because it is not duplicate/low-signal and technical merge judgment is outside this job.
Useful feature/fix PR with failing proof and author-follow-up state; not eligible for low-signal or superseded closure in this job.
Focused provider bug-fix PR; keep open because the failed proof/maintainer-review state blocks any stronger automated action.
Related open issue for #71863; keep it open because the candidate PR is not merged and post-merge closeout is disabled.
Related follow-up capability issue; it is not covered by the narrow #69199 UX fix and should remain open.
